description: Sequel provides webinar, live session, and virtual event components for embedding real-time video, networking, registration, and analytics into other products. It is used by companies to run and measure live and on-demand event experiences on their own websites or platforms.
summary: Sequel exposes a documented REST API for event, company, networking, customization, and usage operations, plus a Node.js SDK package that wraps the same API; both use Sequel-issued client credentials and bearer-token auth.
